exportMethod: admin-only live backend endpoint deployed: POST /api/admin/backup/export-trial-license-data; local fetch helper: node scripts/fetch-trial-license-backup.js
blockers: FIMA_ADMIN_API_KEY/ADMIN_API_KEY is not available in this shell, so Codex cannot fetch the protected export.
RENDER_API_KEY/RENDER_SERVICE_ID is not available, so Codex cannot set Render env vars.
Local pg_dump/psql and DATABASE_URL remain unavailable.
manualBackupCommand: Set FIMA_ADMIN_API_KEY in the process environment without printing it, then run: node scripts/fetch-trial-license-backup.js
restoreNotes: The endpoint excludes password hashes, session/reset/verification token hashes, OAuth token ciphertext, gift code ciphertext, and env secrets.
Do not publish the export; it contains user/license linkage data needed for recovery.
Do not run trial reset until the export exists, parses, has counts, and checksum verification passes.
